AddListenerCertificates.description: Grants permission to add the specified certificates to the specified secure listener

AddTags.description: Grants permission to add the specified tags to the specified load balancer. Each load balancer can have a maximum of 10 tags

AddTrustStoreRevocations.description: Grants permission to add revocations to a trust store

AllowVendedLogDeliveryForResource.description: Grants permission to configure vended log delivery for load balancers

ApplySecurityGroupsToLoadBalancer.description: Grants permission to associate one or more security groups with your load balancer in a virtual private cloud (VPC)

AttachLoadBalancerToSubnets.description: Grants permission to add one or more subnets to the set of configured subnets for the specified load balancer

ConfigureHealthCheck.description: Grants permission to specify the health check settings to use when evaluating the health state of your back-end instances

CreateAppCookieStickinessPolicy.description: Grants permission to generate a stickiness policy with sticky session lifetimes that follow that of an application-generated cookie

CreateLBCookieStickinessPolicy.description: Grants permission to generate a stickiness policy with sticky session lifetimes controlled by the lifetime of the browser (user-agent) or a specified expiration period

CreateListener.description: Grants permission to create a listener for the specified Application Load Balancer

CreateLoadBalancer.description: Grants permission to create a load balancer

CreateLoadBalancerListeners.description: Grants permission to create one or more listeners for the specified load balancer

CreateLoadBalancerPolicy.description: Grants permission to create a policy with the specified attributes for the specified load balancer

CreateRule.description: Grants permission to create a rule for the specified listener

CreateTargetGroup.description: Grants permission to create a target group

CreateTrustStore.description: Grants permission to create a trust store

CreateWebACLAssociation.description: Grants permission to associate WAF WebACL to the specified load balancer

DeleteListener.description: Grants permission to delete the specified listener

DeleteLoadBalancer.description: Grants permission to delete the specified load balancer

DeleteLoadBalancerListeners.description: Grants permission to delete the specified listeners from the specified load balancer

DeleteLoadBalancerPolicy.description: Grants permission to delete the specified policy from the specified load balancer. This policy must not be enabled for any listeners

DeleteRule.description: Grants permission to delete the specified rule

DeleteSharedTrustStoreAssociation.description: Grants permission to delete the specified shared trust store association

DeleteTargetGroup.description: Grants permission to delete the specified target group

DeleteTrustStore.description: Grants permission to delete the specified trust store

DeleteWebACLAssociation.description: Grants permission to disassociate WAF WebACL from the specified load balancer

DeregisterInstancesFromLoadBalancer.description: Grants permission to deregister the specified instances from the specified load balancer

DeregisterTargets.description: Grants permission to deregister the specified targets from the specified target group

DescribeAccountLimits.description: Grants permission to describe the Elastic Load Balancing resource limits for the AWS account

DescribeCapacityReservation.description: Grants permission to describe the capacity reservation for a load balancer

DescribeInstanceHealth.description: Grants permission to describe the state of the specified instances with respect to the specified load balancer

DescribeListenerAttributes.description: Grants permission to describe the attributes for the specified listener

DescribeListenerCertificates.description: Grants permission to describe the certificates for the specified secure listener

DescribeListeners.description: Grants permission to describe the specified listeners or the listeners for the specified Application Load Balancer

DescribeLoadBalancerAttributes.description: Grants permission to describe the attributes for the specified load balancer

DescribeLoadBalancerPolicies.description: Grants permission to describe the specified policies

DescribeLoadBalancerPolicyTypes.description: Grants permission to describe the specified load balancer policy types

DescribeLoadBalancers.description: Grants permission to describe the specified the load balancers. If no load balancers are specified, the call describes all of your load balancers

DescribeRules.description: Grants permission to describe the specified rules or the rules for the specified listener

DescribeSSLPolicies.description: Grants permission to describe the specified policies or all policies used for SSL negotiation

DescribeTags.description: Grants permission to describe the tags associated with the specified resource

DescribeTargetGroupAttributes.description: Grants permission to describe the attributes for the specified target group

DescribeTargetGroups.description: Grants permission to describe the specified target groups or all of your target groups

DescribeTargetHealth.description: Grants permission to describe the health of the specified targets or all of your targets

DescribeTrustStoreAssociations.description: Grants permission to describe the associations with a trust store

DescribeTrustStoreRevocations.description: Grants permission to describe the specified trust stores revocations or all of your revocations related to a trust store

DescribeTrustStores.description: Grants permission to describe the specified trust stores or all of your trust stores

DescribeWebACLAssociation.description: Grants permission to describe all load balancers associated to a WAF WebACL in your account

DetachLoadBalancerFromSubnets.description: Grants permission to remove the specified subnets from the set of configured subnets for the load balancer

DisableAvailabilityZonesForLoadBalancer.description: Grants permission to remove the specified Availability Zones from the set of Availability Zones for the specified load balancer

EnableAvailabilityZonesForLoadBalancer.description: Grants permission to add the specified Availability Zones to the set of Availability Zones for the specified load balancer

GetLoadBalancerWebACL.description: Grants permission to retrieve the WAF WebACL associated to the specified load balancer

GetResourcePolicy.description: Grants permission to retrieve the resource policy associated with the resource

GetTrustStoreCaCertificatesBundle.description: Grants permission to retrieve a trust store CA certificates bundle

GetTrustStoreRevocationContent.description: Grants permission to retrieve a trust store revocation content

ModifyCapacityReservation.description: Grants permission to modify the capacity reservation for a load balancer

ModifyIpPools.description: Grants permission to modify the ip pools for a load balancer

ModifyListener.description: Grants permission to modify the specified properties of the specified listener

ModifyListenerAttributes.description: Grants permission to modify the attributes of the specified listener

ModifyLoadBalancerAttributes.description: Grants permission to modify the attributes of the specified load balancer

ModifyRule.description: Grants permission to modify the specified rule

ModifyTargetGroup.description: Grants permission to modify the health checks used when evaluating the health state of the targets in the specified target group

ModifyTargetGroupAttributes.description: Grants permission to modify the specified attributes of the specified target group

ModifyTrustStore.description: Grants permission to modify the specified trust store

RegisterInstancesWithLoadBalancer.description: Grants permission to add the specified instances to the specified load balancer

RegisterTargets.description: Grants permission to register the specified targets with the specified target group

RemoveListenerCertificates.description: Grants permission to remove the specified certificates of the specified secure listener

RemoveTags.description: Grants permission to remove one or more tags from the specified load balancer

RemoveTrustStoreRevocations.description: Grants permission to remove revocations from a trust store

SetIpAddressType.description: Grants permission to set the type of IP addresses used by the subnets of the specified load balancer

SetLoadBalancerListenerSSLCertificate.description: Grants permission to set the certificate that terminates the specified listener's SSL connections

SetLoadBalancerPoliciesForBackendServer.description: Grants permission to replace the set of policies associated with the specified port on which the back-end server is listening with a new set of policies

SetLoadBalancerPoliciesOfListener.description: Grants permission to replace the current set of policies for the specified load balancer port with the specified set of policies

SetRulePriorities.description: Grants permission to set the priorities of the specified rules

SetSecurityGroups.description: Grants permission to associate the specified security groups with the specified load balancer

SetSubnets.description: Grants permission to enable the Availability Zone for the specified subnets for the specified load balancer

SetWebAcl.description: Grants permission to give WebAcl permission to WAF

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by a tag key and value pair that is allowed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by a tag key and value pair of a resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by a list of tag keys that are allowed in the request

elasticloadbalancing:CreateAction.description: Filters access by the name of a resource-creating API action

elasticloadbalancing:ListenerProtocol.description: Filters access by the listener protocol that is allowed in the request

elasticloadbalancing:ResourceTag/.description: Filters access by the preface string for a tag key and value pair that are attached to a resource

elasticloadbalancing:ResourceTag/${TagKe.description: Filters access by the preface string for a tag key and value pair that are attached to a resource

elasticloadbalancing:Scheme.description: Filters access by the load balancer scheme that is allowed in the request

elasticloadbalancing:SecurityGroup.description: Filters access by the security-group IDs that are allowed in the request

elasticloadbalancing:SecurityPolicy.description: Filters access by the SSL Security Policies that are allowed in the request

elasticloadbalancing:Subnet.description: Filters access by the subnet IDs that are allowed in the request
